Claude Code wrappers: `--dangerously-skip-permissions` (already passed by `glmcc`/`arkcc`/`deepseekcc`) or `--permission-mode auto`. opencode: `--dangerously-skip-permissions`. |
| `model not found` / `provider not configured` | Wrong model id format | opencode requires `provider/model` (`github-copilot/gpt-5-mini`, not `gpt-5-mini`). Check `opencode providers` + `opencode models <provider>`. For cursor-agent use `--list-models`; for `glmcc` / `deepseekcc`, `--list-models`. `arkcc` has no lister — consult the Volcano Engine Ark catalog. |
| Auth-looking error but creds are fine | Same as above — model id format, not auth | Re-check the model id before re-logging in. |
| Working directory was ignored | Wrong "set cwd" flag for this CLI | copilot: `-C <dir>`. cursor-agent: `--workspace <path>`. glmcc: `cd` first (no `-C`/`--workspace`). opencode: `--dir <path>`. |
| `--add-dir` didn't change cwd | It's purely additive (allow extra paths, doesn't move cwd) | `cd` first, then use `--add-dir` only to expand access. |
| Trace is much thinner than expected | Forgot the per-CLI "verbose" knob | cursor-agent: `--stream-partial-output`. Claude Code wrappers: `--include-partial-messages --include-hook-events --verbose`. opencode: `--thinking`. copilot: `--log-level debug`. |
| TUI-only run, no JSONL produced | Trace mode requires the non-interactive entrypoint | Use `-p` / `--print` (copilot, cursor-agent, Claude Code wrappers) or `opencode run`. Trace flags are silently ignored in TUI mode. |
| Want only the final answer, no event stream | Default output format already does this; trace mode was opt-in | All four default to non-JSONL final-only output. Don't pass `--output-format json` / `--format json` if you only want the answer. copilot also has `-s` / `--silent` for extra-terse output. |
| Want a JSON-schema-constrained final answer | Confusing event-stream JSON with schema-shaped result JSON | Only the **Claude Code wrappers** (`glmcc`/`arkcc`/`deepseekcc`/`claude`) validate the result against a schema (`--json-schema '<schema>'`). The others need the schema embedded in the prompt and downstream validation. See `references/tracing.md` § "Two different structured output needs". |
| Want a read-only / plan mode | Each CLI has a different flag | copilot: `--mode plan` or `--plan`. cursor-agent: `--mode ask\|plan`. Claude Code wrappers: `--permission-mode plan`. opencode: **no flag** — define an agent profile via `opencode agent`. |
| Want fine-grained per-tool restrictions | Capabilities differ by CLI | copilot: `--allow-tool / --deny-tool / --available-tools / --excluded-tools`. Claude Code wrappers: `--allowedTools / --disallowedTools / --tools`. cursor-agent: **no per-tool flag** — use `--mode` + `--sandbox`. opencode: **no per-tool flag** — use agent profiles. |
| Want to load a plugin into the agent | Extension surfaces differ | Claude Code wrappers support full plugin install/enable/disable plus per-run `--plugin-dir <path>` / `--plugin-url <url>` — see `claude-code-wrappers.md` § "Claude Code plugins". cursor-agent: `--plugin-dir <path>` for local plugin directories only. opencode: `opencode plugin <module>`. copilot: `copilot plugin` subcommand. |
| `copilot --list-models` doesn't exist | It's just not implemented | Use the GitHub Copilot docs or the interactive `/model` picker. Other CLIs have list-models flags: `cursor-agent --list-models`, `glmcc --list-models`, `deepseekcc --list-models`, `opencode models [provider]`. `arkcc` has no lister either. |
| Cursor-agent claims "sandbox enabled" but reads outside `--workspace` | `--sandbox` doesn't actually block filesystem reads | Copy the inputs the agent should see into a tmp dir and point `--workspace` there. Don't rely on `--sandbox` for true isolation. |
| Disk log files piling up | No automatic rotation | Clean `~/.copilot/logs/` (or your `--log-dir`) periodically. |

## Testing pattern (cross-CLI)

When verifying a new agent install or auth flow, use a trivial prompt first:

```text
Reply with exactly: OK
```

When verifying directory selection, ask for cwd/workspace only:

```text
Reply with the current working directory only.
```

On macOS, `/tmp` may resolve to `/private/tmp`; that is expected.

For trace-capture verification, prefer a prompt that **forces a tool call** (otherwise the trace contains no `tool_*` events to inspect):

```text
List the files in this directory using ls, then report the count of files.
```

## Output discipline

- Give the user the exact command to run, not a vague description.
- If auth/provider setup is missing, say which login command is needed.
- If the user asks which tool to use, recommend one and explain the tradeoff in **one sentence**.
- For opencode, always check provider-prefixed model names before blaming auth.
- When recommending a trace flag, also tell the user where the trace will land (stdout vs file) and one jq one-liner to read it. Don't dump the whole event taxonomy unless asked — point at `references/<cli>.md`.

## When NOT to use this skill

- The user wants an IDE-integrated agent inside Cursor / VS Code / JetBrains — that's the host editor, not these CLIs. This skill covers terminal usage only.
- The user wants stock Claude Code from Anthropic (not one of the vendor wrappers). Use the `claude` command directly — its flag surface is identical to what `claude-code-wrappers.md` documents, since the wrappers are just env-var routers around the same binary.
- The user wants to *build* a coding agent (rather than use one). Use the `claude-api` skill or the Anthropic SDK directly.

name: use-cosyvoice
description: Use when the user wants to clone a voice or synthesize speech in a specific/custom voice with CosyVoice3 — e.g. \"clone my voice\", \"用我的声音合成\", \"声音克隆\", \"zero-shot TTS\", \"make this text sound like <speaker>\", cross-lingual (clone a zh voice to speak English), or instruct-style speech (excited/dialect). Covers the local `cosyvoice-mlx` (Apple Silicon/MLX) and `cosyvoice3` (pure-Rust/Candle) CLIs: download / say / clone / voices, reference-audio prep, and length/quality tuning. For plain preset-voice TTS (Kokoro/MiniMax/Piper) use `use-tts` instead; for transcription use `use-asr`.
body:
# Use CosyVoice3 (voice cloning TTS)

CosyVoice3 clones a voice from a short reference clip and speaks new text in it.
Two local CLIs share the same subcommands, config, and voice registry:

| CLI | Backend | Use when |
|-----|---------|----------|
| `cosyvoice-mlx` | MLX (Python) | Apple Silicon, fastest |
| `cosyvoice3` | Candle (pure Rust) | no Python at runtime, Linux/Metal/CUDA |

Both: `download` · `say` · `clone` · `voices`. Config + voices live in
`~/.config/cosyvoice/` (shared between the two).

## First run

```bash
cosyvoice-mlx download            # MLX: via ModelScope (+ --whisper for cross-lingual)
cosyvoice3   download             # Rust: hf + hf_transfer (Candle weights)
```
Idempotent — already-downloaded files are skipped. Records the model path in config.

## Synthesize

```bash
# Built-in voice (works immediately)
cosyvoice-mlx say "你好世界" -o out.wav

# Clone a clip — ZERO-SHOT: pass the EXACT transcript of the clip via -t
cosyvoice3 clone "要合成的文本" -r ref.wav -t "参考音频里的原话" -o out.wav

# INSTRUCT (style/dialect)
cosyvoice-mlx say "I have news!" -i "Speak with excitement" -o out.wav
cosyvoice3   clone "你好" -r ref.wav -i "请用兴奋的语气说。<|endofprompt|>" -o out.wav

# CROSS-LINGUAL (clone a zh voice, speak English): prefix <|en|>, omit -t
cosyvoice3 clone "<|en|>Crossing languages." -r zh_ref.wav -o out.wav
```
Mode is inferred: `-t` → zero-shot, `-i` → instruct, neither → cross-lingual
(force with `--mode`). Play output with `afplay out.wav` (macOS).

## Make a good reference clip (this决定克隆质量)

```bash
rec -c 1 -r 16000 ~/myvoice.wav      # speak 8–12s, Ctrl-C to stop (needs mic permission)
asr-cli ~/myvoice.wav                # get the transcript for -t  (see use-asr)
```
Rules: ≤30s, clean, **no fillers/code-switching/trailing questions** (they make the
model ramble), don't cut mid-word. For zero-shot, `-t` must match the clip.

## Reuse a voice (shared registry)

```bash
cosyvoice-mlx voices add me -r ~/myvoice.wav -t "录音原话"
cosyvoice3    say "用我的声音说这句" -v me -o out.wav     # works in BOTH CLIs
cosyvoice-mlx voices list ; cosyvoice3 voices rm me
```

## Tuning (learned the hard way)

- **Output too long / rambling** → raise `--repetition-penalty` (1.05–1.1). Do **NOT**
  lower `--temperature` for this — too-greedy decoding falls into a repetition loop.
  On MLX also cap `--max-tokens` (e.g. 300).
- **Biggest quality lever is the reference clip**, not flags.
- Rust prompt audio must be **WAV/MP3/OGG** (no AIFF) — transcode: `afconvert -f WAVE -d LEI16@16000 -c 1 in.aiff out.wav`.
- MLX cross-lingual needs the Whisper model (`cosyvoice-mlx download --whisper`); Rust cross-lingual needs no extra model.

## Pointers

- Build/install: `python/cosyvoice-mlx`, `crates/cosyvoice3-cli` (each has a justfile).
- Model download internals + offline HF cache: see `download-models-from-modelscope`.
- `~/sync/bin/cosyvoice-mlx` (launcher) and `~/sync/bin_arm64/cosyvoice3` are on PATH.

name: use-dingding-talk
description: Use when the user wants to drive the DingTalk macOS desktop app (com.alibaba.DingTalkMac) via macbot — confirming window topology, reading the AX tree, identifying clickable elements, switching DingTalk windows, or running pointed automation against the main window or AI 搜问 panel. 在 macOS 上自动化操作钉钉桌面端时触发。Requires the desktop UI; not for the web client.
body:
# Use DingTalk Talk

基于一次真实探索记录整理的钉钉桌面端自动化笔记。目标不是“通用 GUI 自动化理论”，而是把当前机器上已经证实可用的观察和操作路径固定下来，供后续继续跑。

## 前置条件

1. `macbot` 已安装，可通过 `~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot` 调用。
2. 已授予：
   - Accessibility
   - Screen Recording
3. 钉钉已登录，并且至少有一个主程序窗口。

权限可先检查：

```bash
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot permissions --json
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot doctor
```

## 已验证的基础命令

```bash
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot monitor list
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot app list --json
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot window list --json
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot window list --app com.alibaba.DingTalkMac --json
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot ui tree --app com.alibaba.DingTalkMac --depth 5 --json
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot menu list --app com.alibaba.DingTalkMac --json
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot app activate --bundle com.alibaba.DingTalkMac
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot app wait-ready --bundle com.alibaba.DingTalkMac --require frontmost,window --json
```

## 当前机器上的窗口发现

探索时观测到钉钉有两个窗口：

1. 主屏窗口：
   - `id=18971`
   - 标题：`AI 搜问`
   - Bounds：`1282,35 1273x1399`
2. 左侧副屏窗口：
   - `id=17308`
   - 标题：`钉钉`
   - Bounds：`-1915,460 1123x1039`

显示器拓扑：

- 主屏：`LG UltraFine`，Bounds `0,0 2560x1440`
- 左侧副屏：`Redmi Monitor`，Bounds `-1920,425 1920x1080`

重新确认用：

```bash
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot monitor list
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot window list --app com.alibaba.DingTalkMac --json
```

## AI 搜问窗：已确认结构

`AI 搜问` 窗口的 AX 树较稳定，已确认以下节点：

- 顶栏按钮：
  - `e_2`
  - `e_3`
  - `e_4`
  - `e_6`
  - `e_13`
- 组织切换按钮：
  - `e_12`
  - 标题：`绚星智慧科技有限公司`
- 标题文本：
  - `e_9`
  - 值：`工作台`
- 主体容器：
  - `e_14`：`AXGroup`
  - `e_17`：`AXWebArea`

已验证：

- `e_17` 已加载：`AXLoaded=true`
- `e_17` 支持动作：`AXShowMenu`、`AXScrollToVisible`
- 但 `WebArea` 子结构不能直接通过 `ui attr` 展开成可操作 DOM 节点

检查命令：

```bash
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot ui get-id --app com.alibaba.DingTalkMac --id=e_17 --json
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot ui actions --id e_17 --app com.alibaba.DingTalkMac --json
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot ui attr --id e_17 AXLoaded --app com.alibaba.DingTalkMac --json
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot ui attr --id e_17 AXChildren --app com.alibaba.DingTalkMac --json
```

结论：

- `AI 搜问` 窗的大部分业务交互藏在 `WebKit WebContent` / `AXWebArea` 里。
- 纯 AX 路线拿不到明确输入框时，应切 OCR / 坐标策略。

## 左侧主程序窗：已确认结构

左侧副屏主窗的稳定节点：

- 顶栏按钮：
  - `e_117`：标题 ``
  - `e_118`：无标题按钮
  - `e_119`：标题 ``
  - `e_120`：标题 ``
- 左侧列表行：
  - `e_129` 到 `e_141`
  - 角色都是 `AXRow`

对左侧列表做过一次点击后，右侧暴露出可点击内容：

- `e_151`：`你可能错过重要信息`
- `e_152`：`通知已关闭，你将无法收到任何消息通知`
- `e_153`：`去设置中打开`
- `e_154`：无标题关闭类按钮
- `e_155`：图标按钮 ``
- `e_157`：图标按钮 ``
- `e_159`：图标按钮 ``
- `e_169`：无标题按钮

结论：

- 左侧主程序窗比 `AI 搜问` 更适合继续 AX 自动化。
- 先点 `AXRow`，再探右侧按钮，是当前最稳的继续路径。

## 菜单：已验证状态

以下菜单项已在 `menu list --app com.alibaba.DingTalkMac --json` 中确认：

- `钉钉 > 设置…`
- `钉钉 > 检查更新`
- `修改 > 搜索`
- `窗口 > 打开DING窗口`
- `窗口 > 钉钉`
- `窗口 > AI 搜问`

注意：

- `menu query 修改 搜索` 当时返回过 `found=false`，但完整 `menu list` 里能看到该项存在且启用。
- 菜单 API 在钉钉上不是完全稳定，必要时先 `menu list` 再决定是否 `menu click`。

推荐命令：

```bash
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot menu list --app com.alibaba.DingTalkMac --json
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot menu click 窗口 AI 搜问 --json
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot menu click 钉钉 设置… --json
```

## 已验证的点击方式

按钮动作查询：

```bash
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot ui actions --id e_4 --app com.alibaba.DingTalkMac --json
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot ui actions --id e_5 --app com.alibaba.DingTalkMac --json
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot ui actions --id e_6 --app com.alibaba.DingTalkMac --json
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot ui actions --id e_7 --app com.alibaba.DingTalkMac --json
```

这些按钮都暴露了 `AXPress`。

实际点击时，`ui click-id` 返回的执行方法通常是 `mouse`：

```bash
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot ui click-id --id e_12 --app com.alibaba.DingTalkMac --json
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot ui click-id --id e_117 --app com.alibaba.DingTalkMac --json
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot ui click-id --id e_129 --app com.alibaba.DingTalkMac --json
```

点击后必须立刻复抓树验证：

```bash
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot ui tree --app com.alibaba.DingTalkMac --depth 5 --json
```

## 已知问题

1. `agent observe` 不可靠  
   它会抓当前前台终端窗口，而不一定抓到钉钉。不要把它作为主路径。

2. `ui focused-element` 可能报 `AX error -25204`  
   钉钉当前状态下拿焦点元素不稳定，不要依赖它判断输入焦点。

3. `window focus` / `window state` 对钉钉有兼容性问题  
   在已知窗口存在的情况下，仍可能报：
   - `window_not_found`
   - `Failed to find focused window`

4. `screenshot` 在这次探索中出现卡住且未落文件  
   当前不要把截图产物作为主验证路径，先用 `window list`、`ui tree`、`menu list`。

5. `cmd+f` 后没有暴露可见 `text-input`  
   说明搜索框多半在 WebView 内部，不能指望 AX 直接给出 `AXTextField`。

6. 右侧详情区直接滚动不一定生效  
   先把鼠标点进右侧消息内容区，再发送滚轮事件，命中率明显更高。

## 推荐继续策略

### 路线 A：继续打左侧主程序窗

目标：摸清左栏各 `AXRow` 分别对应什么模块或会话。

步骤：

1. 抓 `interactable` 树
2. 依次点击 `e_129` 到 `e_141`
3. 每次点击后重新抓树
4. 记录新增的带标题按钮和文案

命令模板：

```bash
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot ui click-id --id e_129 --app com.alibaba.DingTalkMac --json
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot ui tree --app com.alibaba.DingTalkMac --depth 5 --filter interactable --json
```

### 路线 A1：按 OCR 文本直接选会话

当左侧会话列表已经可见时，优先按会话文本做 OCR 点击，而不是硬编码 `AXRow` 序号。

这次探索里已经验证过以下文本可命中：

- `GitLab`
- `xuanxing2`
- `rocketmq`

已验证命令：

```bash
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot text find "GitLab" --display-id 1 --json
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot text find "xuanxing2" --display-id 1 --json
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot text click "GitLab" --display-id 1 --json
```

观察结果：

- `text click "GitLab"` 返回 `executed=true`
- 点击点落在左侧副屏会话列表区域
- 点击后右侧 OCR 切换为 GitLab 会话详情，可读到：
  - `pushed to branch v2_test`
  - `aisdlc`
  - 多条 commit / branch 文本

推荐工作流：

1. `app activate`
2. `ocr screen --index 1 --json`
3. `text find "<会话关键字>" --display-id 1 --json`
4. `text click "<会话关键字>" --display-id 1 --json`
5. 重新 `ocr screen --index 1 --json`，确认右侧详情已切换

命令模板：

```bash
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot app activate --bundle com.alibaba.DingTalkMac
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot ocr screen --index 1 --json
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot text click "GitLab" --display-id 1 --json
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot ocr screen --index 1 --json
```

### 路线 A2：滚动左侧会话列表

负坐标不要直接传给 `mouse scroll`，否则会被命令行解析成选项。

这次探索里已验证可用的是“副屏相对坐标”写法：

```bash
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot mouse scroll 100 500 --down 20 --lines --relative-to monitor --monitor 1
```

解释：

- `--monitor 1` 指左侧副屏
- `100 500` 是相对于该显示器的点坐标
- 这会把鼠标移到副屏左上区域附近的会话列表，再向下滚

验证方式：

```bash
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot ocr screen --index 1 --json
```

如果滚动成功，左侧会话列表的 OCR 文本或时间戳应当变化。

### 路线 A3：滚动右侧会话详情

当会话已经打开，且右侧详情区能被 OCR 读到时，优先按“先点右侧内容区，再滚动”的顺序操作。

已验证命令：

```bash
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot mouse click 700 650 --relative-to monitor --monitor 1
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot mouse scroll 700 650 --down 40 --lines --relative-to monitor --monitor 1
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot ocr screen --index 1 --json
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot ui tree --app com.alibaba.DingTalkMac --depth 6 --json
```

观察结果：

- 仅滚轮时，OCR 变化不明显。
- 先点击右侧内容区再滚动后，右侧 OCR 出现了之前没有读到的新消息文本，例如：
  - `syncApisHandler @zhujun`
- 同时 `ui tree` 中右侧消息区结构变成更明确的滚动模型：
  - `e_62`: `AXScrollArea`
  - `e_63`: `AXList`
  - `e_64`: `AXScrollBar`

结论：

- 右侧详情区可以滚动。
- 但它的可见文本重复度较高，单看顶部一两行不够稳定，最好用“是否出现新 handler / 新时间段文本”来判断是否滚动成功。

推荐验证信号：

1. 滚动前先记一组右侧 OCR 关键词
2. 滚动后重新 OCR
3. 检查是否出现新的任务名、处理器名或时间段文本

推荐组合：

```bash
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot mouse scroll 100 500 --down 20 --lines --relative-to monitor --monitor 1
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot ocr screen --index 1 --json
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot text click "xuanxing2" --display-id 1 --json
```

### 路线 B：强攻 AI 搜问窗

目标：对 `AXWebArea` 内部内容做 OCR 和坐标点击。

步骤：

1. 确认 `AI 搜问` 窗仍存在
2. 激活钉钉
3. 用 `ocr screen --main --json` 或 `text find`
4. 找到可见文字后走 `text click`

命令模板：

```bash
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot ocr screen --main --json
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot text find "工作台" --window --json
~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot text click "工作台" --window
```

## 最小工作流

当用户说“继续探索钉钉”时，优先这样做：

1. `window list --app com.alibaba.DingTalkMac --json`
2. 判断当前是单窗还是双窗
3. `ui tree --app com.alibaba.DingTalkMac --depth 5 --filter interactable --json`
4. 如果是副屏主窗，优先 `ocr screen --index 1 --json` 后按文本点会话
5. 会话不在当前视口时，先 `mouse scroll ... --relative-to monitor --monitor 1`
6. 如果是 `AI 搜问`，优先围绕 `WebArea` 做 OCR
6. 每做一步点击，都重新抓树，不要盲点第二步

## 不要做的事

- 不要假设 `agent observe` 看到的是钉钉
- 不要假设 `cmd+f` 后一定出现 AX 输入框
- 不要在没复抓树前连续点击多个节点
- 不要把旧的 `e_*` id 跨状态长期复用；窗口内容变化后应重新抓树

name: use-doubao-app
description: Use when the user wants to drive the Doubao (豆包) macOS desktop app (com.bot.pc.doubao) via macbot — activating it, starting a new chat, sending text or long prompts, switching bottom tool modes (快速 / AI 播客 / 图像生成 / 帮我写作 / 翻译 / 编程 / 更多), uploading files, or copying/saving responses. 在 macOS 上自动化操作豆包桌面端时触发。For image generation only, prefer `gen-image-via-doubao-app`.
body:
# 豆包桌面端自动化操作指南

把豆包 App 当作黑盒 UI 操作目标。优先使用 `macbot` 的 app、keyboard、mouse、screenshot、ground、text/ui 能力；每个关键动作后必须用截图、剪贴板或文件系统验证。

## 前置条件

- 豆包 App 已安装并登录，bundle id 为 `com.bot.pc.doubao`。
- `macbot` 已安装，并有辅助功能与屏幕录制权限。
- `macbot ground` 可用；涉及 OCR 点击时 `macbot text` 可用。
- 中文、长文本、多行提示词、代码块优先走剪贴板粘贴，避免键入丢字或输入法状态影响。

## 核心原则

1. 交互命令必须和激活放在同一条 shell 命令里，避免终端抢焦点。
2. 优先用 `ground --screen` 返回的 `screen_logical` 坐标直接点击；只有截图局部分析时才用窗口相对坐标。
3. 每一步失败后先截图观察，再重试当前步骤；不要盲目继续下一步。
4. 默认使用窗口模式操作。全屏、侧边浮层、文件保存面板会提高坐标和焦点失败率。
5. 图片生成任务优先读取 `/Users/junix/projects/skills/gen-image-via-doubao-app/SKILL.md`，该技能有更完整的生成与截图保存流程。

## 激活与状态确认

覆盖未启动、后台隐藏、最小化、被遮挡等状态：

```bash
open -b com.bot.pc.doubao && sleep 1 && macbot app activate --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao
sleep 0.5
macbot screenshot window --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao --path /tmp/doubao_activated.png
```

验证截图中出现豆包窗口。常见左侧导航包含 `豆包`、`AI 浏览器`、`AI 创作`、`云盘`、`更多`；底部输入区常见工具包含 `快速`、`AI 播客`、`图像生成`、`帮我写作`、`翻译`、`编程`、`更多`。

如果当前有保存面板、预览层、右键菜单或大图预览遮挡，先关闭：

```bash
macbot app activate --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao && sleep 0.2 && macbot keyboard tap esc && sleep 0.4
macbot screenshot window --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao --path /tmp/doubao_clear_overlay.png
```

## 新建或进入对话

### 新建对话

优先使用快捷键；失败时点击左上角新建图标。

```bash
macbot app activate --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao && sleep 0.2 && osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "n" using {command down}'
sleep 0.5
macbot screenshot window --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao --path /tmp/doubao_new_chat.png
```

如果快捷键无效：

```bash
macbot ground --screen 1 --prompt '定位豆包窗口左上角的新建对话按钮，通常是铅笔或加号图标，只返回中心坐标<point>x y</point>' --json
macbot app activate --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao && sleep 0.2 && macbot mouse click <x> <y>
```

### 打开历史对话

```bash
macbot text click --window --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao '<历史对话标题中的稳定文字>' --json
sleep 0.5
macbot screenshot window --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao --path /tmp/doubao_history_opened.png
```

如果标题被截断，用 `ground` 定位左侧历史列表中的目标行。

## 输入与发送

### 聚焦输入框

```bash
macbot ground --screen 1 --prompt '定位豆包窗口底部消息输入框的可编辑区域，不要点击工具按钮、麦克风或附件按钮，只返回中心坐标<point>x y</point>' --json
macbot mouse click <x> <y> && sleep 0.2 && macbot app activate --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao
```

验证：

```bash
macbot screenshot window --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao --path /tmp/doubao_input_focused.png
```

### 输入短文本

```bash
macbot app activate --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao && sleep 0.2 && macbot keyboard type '你的提示词'
macbot screenshot window --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao --path /tmp/doubao_typed.png
```

### 输入长文本/多行/代码

使用剪贴板粘贴，避免输入法和逐字键入问题：

```bash
cat > /tmp/doubao_prompt.txt <<'EOF'
你的长提示词、代码或多行内容
EOF
pbcopy < /tmp/doubao_prompt.txt
macbot app activate --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao && sleep 0.2 && osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "v" using {command down}'
sleep 0.3
macbot screenshot window --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao --path /tmp/doubao_pasted.png
```

### 发送

优先按回车；如果任务涉及多行输入且回车被当作换行，点击右侧发送按钮。

```bash
macbot app activate --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao && sleep 0.2 && macbot keyboard tap enter
```

按钮兜底：

```bash
macbot ground --screen 1 --prompt '定位豆包输入框右侧的发送按钮，不要选择麦克风按钮，只返回中心坐标<point>x y</point>' --json
macbot app activate --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao && sleep 0.2 && macbot mouse click <x> <y>
```

验证：截图确认用户消息出现在对话区，并出现豆包回复、加载动画或生成卡片。

```bash
sleep 1
macbot screenshot window --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao --path /tmp/doubao_sent.png
```

## 切换底部工具模式

当前 UI 常见底部模式：`快速`、`AI 播客`、`图像生成`、`帮我写作`、`翻译`、`编程`、`更多`。优先 OCR 点击可见文字；看不到目标时点击 `更多` 后再选。

```bash
macbot app activate --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao && sleep 0.2
macbot text click --window --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao '编程' --json
sleep 0.3
macbot screenshot window --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao --path /tmp/doubao_mode_programming.png
```

若 OCR 失败：

```bash
macbot ground --screen 1 --prompt '定位豆包底部工具栏中的“编程”按钮，只返回中心坐标<point>x y</point>' --json
macbot app activate --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao && sleep 0.2 && macbot mouse click <x> <y>
```

模式选择建议：

| 目标 | 模式 |
|---|---|
| 普通问答、快速草稿 | `快速` |
| 代码解释、代码生成、调试建议 | `编程` |
| 翻译文本或文档内容 | `翻译` |
| 文章、邮件、报告改写 | `帮我写作` |
| 根据材料生成播客/音频脚本 | `AI 播客` |
| 生成图片 | `图像生成`，然后读取 `gen-image-via-doubao-app` |

## 上传或处理文件

当用户要求根据 PDF、图片、文档或本地文件提问时：

1. 确认文件路径存在。
2. 点击输入框左侧 `+` 或附件按钮。
3. 在系统文件选择器中粘贴路径或使用最近文件。
4. 等待文件卡片出现在输入框，再发送问题。

```bash
test -f '<absolute_file_path>'
macbot ground --screen 1 --prompt '定位豆包输入框左侧的加号或附件按钮，只返回中心坐标<point>x y</point>' --json
macbot app activate --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao && sleep 0.2 && macbot mouse click <x> <y>
```

如果出现 Finder 打开面板，使用 `Cmd+Shift+G` 跳转路径：

```bash
pbcopy <<'EOF'
<absolute_file_path>
EOF
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "g" using {command down, shift down}'
sleep 0.2
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "v" using {command down}'
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key code 36'
sleep 0.5
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key code 36'
```

验证：截图确认输入框内出现文件卡片，例如 PDF 文件名。不要在文件仍上传或解析时立即发送，先等卡片稳定。

## 等待回复完成

豆包回复可能表现为文本流、卡片、音频播放器、图片网格或文档解析按钮。等待时轮询截图，不要固定只等一次。

```bash
sleep 3
macbot screenshot window --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao --path /tmp/doubao_reply_1.png
sleep 5
macbot screenshot window --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao --path /tmp/doubao_reply_2.png
```

判断完成的信号：

- 输入框恢复可输入。
- 停止/暂停/加载动画消失。
- 生成卡片出现可点击按钮。
- 文本回复底部出现复制、重试、更多等操作区。

## 复制回复或保存结果

### 复制最新文本回复

优先找最新回复底部的复制按钮：

```bash
macbot ground --screen 1 --prompt '定位豆包最新 AI 回复底部的复制按钮，通常是两个重叠方框或“复制”操作，不要选择用户消息，只返回中心坐标<point>x y</point>' --json
macbot app activate --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao && sleep 0.2 && macbot mouse click <x> <y>
sleep 0.3
pbpaste > /tmp/doubao_latest_response.txt
sed -n '1,120p' /tmp/doubao_latest_response.txt
```

如果没有复制按钮，使用文本区域选中兜底：

```bash
macbot ground --screen 1 --prompt '定位豆包最新 AI 文本回复正文区域的中间位置，不要点击链接、按钮或输入框，只返回中心坐标<point>x y</point>' --json
macbot app activate --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao && sleep 0.2 && macbot mouse click <x> <y>
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "a" using {command down}'
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "c" using {command down}'
pbpaste > /tmp/doubao_selected_response.txt
```

验证剪贴板内容确实来自豆包最新回复，不包含用户提示词、侧边栏标题或输入框残留。

### 保存图片/音频/文件

对生成图片、播客音频或下载按钮，不要把窗口截图当作原文件。优先使用豆包原生下载、保存、另存为或右键菜单；保存后用 `file`、`ls -lh` 和必要时 `view_image`/播放器验证。

图片生成请使用 `/Users/junix/projects/skills/gen-image-via-doubao-app/SKILL.md` 的专门流程。

### 下载 AI 播客音频

音频播放器卡片底部控制栏通常有一排按钮：`15`、`30`、`1x`、下载箭头、时间、更多控制。下载按钮是 `1x` 右侧的向下箭头图标，下方有短横线；不要误点右上角窗口工具栏或播放器右侧的暂停/播放按钮。

```bash
macbot ground --screen 1 --prompt '在豆包窗口中定位音频播放器卡片里的下载音频按钮。它通常是一个向下箭头图标，位于播放器底部一排控制按钮中，在播放速度 1x 右侧附近。只返回该下载按钮中心坐标<point>x y</point>，不要选择播放/暂停、15秒、30秒、窗口工具栏或更多按钮。' --json
macbot app activate --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao && sleep 0.2 && macbot mouse click <x> <y>
```

如果 `ground --screen` 误识别到窗口右上角工具栏，先截图并用图片坐标约束到播放器卡片：

```bash
macbot screenshot window --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao --path /tmp/doubao_audio_card.png
macbot ground --image /tmp/doubao_audio_card.png --prompt '只看中间的音频播放器卡片。定位卡片底部控制栏中的下载按钮：它是一个向下箭头，下方有一条短横线，位于“1x”右侧、时间左侧。只返回该按钮中心坐标<point>x y</point>，不要选择右上角窗口工具栏的任何按钮。' --json
```

窗口截图常见为 2x Retina 像素。若 `ground --image` 返回 normalized 坐标，需要换算成窗口逻辑坐标后再加窗口左上角位置：

```bash
# 示例：截图 2544x2798，ground 返回 normalized point 377,264
# 图像像素约为 959,739；Retina 逻辑坐标约为 480,369。
osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to tell process "豆包" to get {position, size} of front window'
# 如果窗口 position 是 1282,35，则全局点击坐标约为 1282+480,35+369 => 1762,404。
```

点击后如果出现系统保存面板，按任务指定目录和文件名保存；如果直接下载到默认目录，检查 `~/Downloads`、`~/Desktop` 或豆包默认导出目录中最近修改的音频文件：

```bash
find ~/Downloads ~/Desktop -maxdepth 1 -type f \( -iname '*.mp3' -o -iname '*.m4a' -o -iname '*.wav' \) -mmin -5 -print
```

## 常见问题

| 现象 | 常见原因 | 处理 |
|---|---|---|
| 文本输入到了终端 | 交互命令分开执行导致终端抢焦点 | 把激活、点击、粘贴/输入合并在同一条命令里 |
| `ground` 点错位置 | 提示词太泛或窗口有遮挡 | 先截图，提示词明确“不要点击工具按钮/输入框/用户消息”等排除条件 |
| 截图不是豆包窗口 | 当前前台窗口不是豆包或系统面板遮挡 | `open -b com.bot.pc.doubao && macbot app activate --bundle com.bot.pc.doubao` 后重截 |
| 回车没有发送 | 当前输入框把回车当换行或焦点不在输入区 | 点击右侧发送按钮 |
| 复制内容不对 | 复制到了用户消息、侧栏或输入框 | 重新定位“最新 AI 回复底部复制按钮”，复制后用 `pbpaste` 验证 |
| 文件没有上传成功 | 文件选择器未确认或上传仍在进行 | 截图确认文件卡片稳定后再发送 |
| 全屏下坐标偏移 | macOS Spaces/全屏窗口影响屏幕坐标 | 退出全屏或改用窗口模式 |

## 退出条件

完成任务前至少验证一个结果：

- 文本任务：`pbpaste` 或保存的 `/tmp/doubao_*.txt` 中包含目标回复。
- 文件任务：截图显示文件卡片和相关回复，必要时复制回复内容。
- 图片/音频任务：目标文件存在，大小非零，格式正确，内容不是豆包 UI 截图。

name: use-ghostty
description: Use when the user wants to automate Ghostty terminal on macOS via AppleScript and osascript — list windows/tabs/terminals, focus panes by working directory, send text or keys, split panes, open new windows, scroll or run keybind actions, or broadcast commands to all terminals. Triggers include Ghostty, ghostty AppleScript, osascript Ghostty, terminal automation on Ghostty, driving shell or coding agents in Ghostty panes, split/focus/new window Ghostty. Not for Kitty (use-kitty), tmux (use-tmux-ops), or reading terminal buffer text without GUI/OCR. macOS only.
body:
# 用 Ghostty AppleScript 控制终端

Ghostty **1.3+** 在 macOS 上提供 AppleScript 字典（`application → windows → tabs → terminals`）。本 skill 用 `scripts/` 下的 shell 包装 `osascript`，供 agent 稳定调用。

官方文档：<https://ghostty.org/docs/features/applescript>  
限制说明：[references/applescript-limits.md](references/applescript-limits.md)

## 何时用 / 不用

| 用 | 不用 |
|----|------|
| macOS 上向 Ghostty pane **发命令**、分屏、聚焦、滚动 | 读屏内文字 → 无 API；用 Kitty/tmux 或 `use-macbot` |
| 按 **cwd** 找 terminal（`working directory contains`） | Linux 版 Ghostty（无 AppleScript） |
| 一键 `new window` / `split` | `new tab` 在部分版本会失败 (-1708) |

与 **kitty-ops** / **tmux-ops** 并列：agent 跑在哪个终端里，就用对应工具。

## 脚本一览

路径：`~/projects/skills/use-ghostty/scripts/`（调用时用绝对路径或 `cd` 到 skill 根目录）。

| 脚本 | 作用 |
|------|------|
| [`scripts/ping.sh`](scripts/ping.sh) | 检查 Ghostty 是否可脚本化 |
| [`scripts/list.sh`](scripts/list.sh) | 列出所有 terminal（默认 JSON） |
| [`scripts/focus.sh`](scripts/focus.sh) | 聚焦 terminal |
| [`scripts/send-line.sh`](scripts/send-line.sh) | 粘贴文本 + Enter |
| [`scripts/send-key.sh`](scripts/send-key.sh) | 单键 / 组合键 |
| [`scripts/split.sh`](scripts/split.sh) | 分屏，返回新 terminal id |
| [`scripts/new-window.sh`](scripts/new-window.sh) | 新窗口（可选 cwd / command） |
| [`scripts/perform.sh`](scripts/perform.sh) | 执行 keybind action（如 `scroll_page_down`） |
| [`scripts/broadcast.sh`](scripts/broadcast.sh) | 向**所有** terminal 发同一行 |

## 会话开头

```bash
SKILL=~/projects/skills/use-ghostty

"$SKILL/scripts/ping.sh" --json
"$SKILL/scripts/list.sh" | jq '.terminals[] | {id: .terminal_id, cwd: .working_directory}'
```

首次调用若失败：系统设置 → 隐私与安全性 → **自动化**，允许 Terminal/Cursor 控制 Ghostty。

## 目标选择

三个脚本共用同一套目标标志（**三选一**）：

| 标志 | 含义 |
|------|------|
| `--focused` | 当前前台 window 的 selected tab 里 focused terminal |
| `--cwd SUBSTR` | `working directory contains SUBSTR` 的第一个匹配 |
| `--id UUID` | 仅 `send-line.sh` / `focus.sh`：精确 terminal id（来自 `list.sh`） |

## 典型工作流

### 驱动当前 pane

```bash
SKILL=~/projects/skills/use-ghostty

"$SKILL/scripts/send-line.sh" --focused 'pwd'
"$SKILL/scripts/perform.sh" --focused scroll_page_up
```

### 按项目目录操作

```bash
"$SKILL/scripts/focus.sh" --cwd kitty-ops
"$SKILL/scripts/send-line.sh" --cwd kitty-ops 'kitty-ops doctor'
```

### 新开窗口跑命令

```bash
"$SKILL/scripts/new-window.sh" --activate --cwd ~/projects/models/kitty-ops
"$SKILL/scripts/new-window.sh" --cwd /tmp --command '/bin/zsh -lc htop'
```

### 四分屏（脚本层循环）

```bash
"$SKILL/scripts/split.sh" --focused --direction right
"$SKILL/scripts/split.sh" --focused --direction down
```

### 广播

```bash
"$SKILL/scripts/broadcast.sh" 'date'
```

## Agent 循环（仅输入侧）

Ghostty **不能**轮询输出。只能：

1. `list.sh` / `--cwd` 定位 pane  
2. `send-line.sh` 发提示  
3. 用 **macbot 截图**、日志文件、或把 agent 放在 Kitty/tmux 里读屏

```bash
# 发提示（示例）
"$SKILL/scripts/send-line.sh" --cwd projects/python/kitty-ops 'echo agent-prompt-done'
```

## AppleScript 对象速查

```
tell application "Ghostty"
    focused terminal of selected tab of front window
    every terminal whose working directory contains "needle"
    split term direction right
    perform action "scroll_page_down" on term
end tell
```

## 退出码（脚本约定）

| 码 | 含义 |
|----|------|
| 0 | 成功 |
| 2 | 参数错误 |
| 3 | Ghostty / osascript 错误 |
| 4 | 无匹配 terminal |
| 127 | 缺少 `osascript` / `python3` |

## 相关

- Kitty：`use-kitty` → `~/projects/models/kitty-ops`
- tmux：`use-tmux-ops` → `~/projects/models/tmux-ops`
- WezTerm：`use-wezterm-ops` → `~/projects/models/wezterm-ops`
- GUI 读屏：`use-macbot`
- 编码代理：`use-code-agents`

## References

改 CLI、契约或实现时，先改下列 `~/projects/<lang>/<repo>/` 路径，再同步本 skill 正文。

| 用途 | 路径 |
|------|------|
| Skill 根 | `~/projects/skills/use-ghostty` |
| 脚本 | `~/projects/skills/use-ghostty/scripts/` |
| 说明 | `~/projects/skills/use-ghostty/README.md` |

name: use-google-ai-bot
body:
# use-google-ai-bot

Drive Google AI Mode (google.com/search?udm=50) through the user's real Chrome
browser via `browser-harness`. Google AI Mode performs deep web searches with
source citations — useful when DuckDuckGo, Bing, Reddit, and news sites all
block automated access.

## Why This Skill Exists

Many sites (Reddit, DuckDuckGo, Google Search proper) block automated requests
via CAPTCHAs and bot detection. Google AI Mode, accessed through the user's
already-logged-in Chrome session, bypasses these restrictions because:

1. The harness reuses the user's real Chrome session (cookies, auth, history).
2. Google AI Mode aggregates and synthesizes content from dozens of sources.
3. The response includes structured text + source citations.

Use this skill as a **fallback** when `web_search` / `web_fetch` / `exec curl`
all fail due to anti-bot measures.

## Prerequisites

- `browser-harness` on `$PATH` (typically `~/sync/bin_arm64/`)
- Chrome running and the user logged into their Google account
- Smoke test:

```bash
browser-harness -c '
new_tab("https://www.google.com")
wait_for_load()
print(JSON.stringify(page_info()))
'
```

If this lands on a real Google page, you're good. If it shows a login wall,
ask the user to log into Google in Chrome first.

## Architecture

```
User query → browser-harness → user's Chrome → Google AI Mode → synthesized answer + sources
```

- **One tab per session** — reuse with `goto_url()` for follow-up queries.
- **Text extraction via `js("document.body.innerText")`** — Google AI Mode
  renders as DOM text, no API needed.
- **Screenshots optional** — for verification, not primary data extraction.

## Workflow 1: Basic Search Query

Navigate to Google AI Mode, type a query, press Enter, wait, extract the response.

```bash
export PATH="$HOME/sync/bin_arm64:$PATH"

# 1. Open Google AI Mode
browser-harness -c '
new_tab("https://www.google.com/search?udm=50")
wait_for_load()
'

# 2. Click the input area and type the query
browser-harness -c '
click_at_xy(895, 400)
cdp("Input.insertText", { text: "YOUR QUERY HERE" })
cdp("Input.dispatchKeyEvent", { type: "keyDown", key: "Enter", code: "Enter", windowsVirtualKeyCode: 13 })
cdp("Input.dispatchKeyEvent", { type: "keyUp", key: "Enter", code: "Enter", windowsVirtualKeyCode: 13 })
'

# 3. Wait for AI response to generate (adjust sleep based on query complexity)
sleep 10

# 4. Extract the full response text
browser-harness -c '
var text = js("document.body.innerText");
print(text);
'
```

### Wrapper: single-command search

For convenience, chain everything in one script:

```bash
export PATH="$HOME/sync/bin_arm64:$PATH"

QUERY="What are the latest Meta layoffs in 2025?"

browser-harness -c '
new_tab("https://www.google.com/search?udm=50")
wait_for_load()
click_at_xy(895, 400)
cdp("Input.insertText", { text: "'"$QUERY"'" })
cdp("Input.dispatchKeyEvent", { type: "keyDown", key: "Enter", code: "Enter", windowsVirtualKeyCode: 13 })
cdp("Input.dispatchKeyEvent", { type: "keyUp", key: "Enter", code: "Enter", windowsVirtualKeyCode: 13 })
'
```

Then wait and extract:

```bash
sleep 10
browser-harness -c '
var text = js("document.body.innerText");
print(text);
'
```

## Workflow 2: Follow-Up Query

Reuse the existing tab — no need to open a new one.

```bash
export PATH="$HOME/sync/bin_arm64:$PATH"

browser-harness -c '
goto_url("https://www.google.com/search?udm=50")
wait_for_load()
click_at_xy(895, 400)
cdp("Input.insertText", { text: "FOLLOW UP QUESTION" })
cdp("Input.dispatchKeyEvent", { type: "keyDown", key: "Enter", code: "Enter", windowsVirtualKeyCode: 13 })
cdp("Input.dispatchKeyEvent", { type: "keyUp", key: "Enter", code: "Enter", windowsVirtualKeyCode: 13 })
'
sleep 10
browser-harness -c '
var text = js("document.body.innerText");
print(text);
'
```

## Workflow 3: Long Responses — Scroll and Extract

Google AI Mode responses can be long. If the initial `innerText` extraction
seems truncated, scroll down and re-extract:

```bash
export PATH="$HOME/sync/bin_arm64:$PATH"

browser-harness -c '
cdp("Input.dispatchKeyEvent", { type: "keyDown", key: "End", code: "End", windowsVirtualKeyCode: 35 })
cdp("Input.dispatchKeyEvent", { type: "keyUp", key: "End", code: "End", windowsVirtualKeyCode: 35 })
'
sleep 2
browser-harness -c '
var text = js("document.body.innerText");
print(text);
'
```

For very long responses, extract in chunks by scrolling incrementally:

```bash
browser-harness -c '
var prev = "";
var all = "";
for (var i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
  js("window.scrollBy(0, 1000)");
  var sleep = function(ms) { return new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, ms) }) };
  // Quick sync wait via busy loop (QuickJS)
  var t = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - t < 1500) {}
  var chunk = js("document.body.innerText");
  if (chunk === prev) break;
  prev = chunk;
}
print(js("document.body.innerText"));
'
```

## Workflow 4: Verify with Screenshot

When you need to visually confirm the response rendered correctly:

```bash
export PATH="$HOME/sync/bin_arm64:$PATH"

browser-harness -c '
capture_screenshot("/tmp/google_ai_response.png")
'
# Copy to workspace for image tool access
cp /tmp/google_ai_response.png ~/.openclaw/workspace/google_ai_response.png
```

## Input Coordinate Notes

The click target for the search input is approximately **(895, 400)** on a
standard 1790×998 viewport. This may vary with:

- Browser zoom level
- Window size
- Display scaling

If the click misses, use `capture_screenshot()` to locate the input field, then
adjust coordinates. The input area is the large text box labeled
"Hi ..., what's on your mind?".

### Alternative: DOM-based input (more reliable)

```bash
browser-harness -c '
js("document.querySelector(\"textarea\").focus()")
cdp("Input.insertText", { text: "YOUR QUERY" })
cdp("Input.dispatchKeyEvent", { type: "keyDown", key: "Enter", code: "Enter", windowsVirtualKeyCode: 13 })
cdp("Input.dispatchKeyEvent", { type: "keyUp", key: "Enter", code: "Enter", windowsVirtualKeyCode: 13 })
'
```

## Response Structure

A typical Google AI Mode response contains:

1. **"You said:"** — the user's query (echo)
2. **Synthesized answer** — multi-paragraph response with inline source links
3. **Source citations** — site names with "+N" indicating additional sources
4. **Related articles** — links at the bottom with dates and excerpts
5. **"AI Mode response is ready"** — footer indicator that generation completed

## Wait Times

| Query complexity | Recommended wait |
|-----------------|-------------------|
| Simple factual | 6-8 seconds |
| News aggregation | 8-12 seconds |
| Deep multi-source research | 12-20 seconds |
| Very complex / controversial | 15-30 seconds |

The "AI Mode response is ready" text at the bottom is the signal that
generation is complete. If you see it in the extracted text, the full response
is available.

## Traps

### Google login wall
If `page_info()` shows a sign-in page, stop and ask the user to log into their
Google account in Chrome. Never type credentials from a screenshot.

### Stale tabs
If the current tab shows `chrome://` or is unresponsive, call
`ensure_real_tab()` before navigating.

### Rate limiting
Google AI Mode is tied to the user's account. Excessive rapid queries may
trigger temporary throttling. Wait 30+ seconds between heavy queries.

### Response not ready
If extracted text does not contain "AI Mode response is ready", the answer may
still be generating. Wait a few more seconds and re-extract.

### Coordinate drift
The input field coordinates assume a specific viewport. Use the DOM-based
`document.querySelector("textarea").focus()` approach for reliability across
different screen sizes.

### Special characters in queries
Avoid raw shell interpolation of complex queries. Use a variable and proper
quoting:

```bash
QUERY='What happened with "Meta layoffs" in 2025?'
```

Or pass through a temp file for very long prompts.

## When to Use vs Alternatives

| Situation | Tool |
|-----------|------|
| `web_search` works normally | Use `web_search` (faster, no browser needed) |
| `web_fetch` can reach the target site | Use `web_fetch` (lighter weight) |
| Sites block automated access (Reddit, DDG, news) | **Use this skill** |
| Need synthesized multi-source answer with citations | **Use this skill** |
| Need real-time data and search APIs are down | **Use this skill** |
| User explicitly asks to "google it" or "ask google" | **Use this skill** |

name: use-kitty
description: Use when the user wants to script or automate Kitty terminal remote control from the shell — listing OS windows/tabs/panes, launching shells, send-text, send-key, get-text, focus/close windows, scroll-window, discover listen_on sockets, doctor connectivity checks, or wait-until-text polling for agent output. Triggers include kitty-ops, ko CLI, kitten @, KITTY_LISTEN_ON, allow_remote_control, driving Claude Code / kimicc / glmcc / codex inside a Kitty pane, agent waiting for terminal text, or errors about remote control / match / socket connection. Not for tmux, WezTerm, or iTerm. For macOS GUI screenshots of the terminal UI, pair with use-macbot.
body:
# 用 kitty-ops 控制 Kitty

`kitty-ops`（短别名 `ko`）是 Kitty 专用远程控制 CLI，装在 `~/sync/bin/kitty-ops`。它薄封装 `kitten @`，并增加 `doctor`、`discover`、`wait-until-text` 与稳定 `--json` / 退出码。

源码：`~/projects/models/kitty-ops`。人类文档：[README](~/projects/models/kitty-ops/README.md)。

## 何时用 / 不用

| 用 | 不用 |
|----|------|
| 从脚本/agent 向 Kitty 窗格发键、读屏内文本、切窗格 | tmux / WezTerm / iTerm 控制（本工具仅 Kitty） |
| 外部终端（Cursor、iTerm）通过 socket 控制 Kitty | 需要点按菜单、读 AX 树 → 用 `use-macbot` |
| 等 Agent 在终端里跑完（`wait-until-text`） | 纯文件/API 任务，不涉及终端 |

**互补：** `kitty-ops get-text` 读字符；`macbot screenshot` 看渲染。驱动 kimicc 时常两者并用。

## 会话开头（每次自动化前）

```bash
# 1. 连通性
kitty-ops doctor
# 退出码须为 0

# 2. 若 doctor 失败或不知道连哪个实例
kitty-ops discover --probe --json | jq '.candidates[] | select(.reachable==true)'

# 3. 外部控制时设置目标（在 Kitty 标签页内可省略）
export KITTY_LISTEN_ON=unix:/tmp/mykitty   # 或 discover 得到的地址

# 4. 解析布局，记下目标窗格 id
kitty-ops ls --json | jq .
```

## 连接两种模式

**模式 A — 在 Kitty 标签页内执行**  
`kitty-ops` 通过 controlling tty 连当前实例。无需 `KITTY_LISTEN_ON`。要求 `kitty.conf` 有 `allow_remote_control yes`（或 `socket-only` 等官方允许的值）。

**模式 B — 外部 shell + socket**  
Kitty 需 `listen_on unix:/path` 或 `kitty --listen-on ...`，且：

```bash
export KITTY_LISTEN_ON=unix:/path
# 或单次：kitty-ops --to unix:/path ls
```

配置片段（`~/.config/kitty/kitty.conf`）：

```conf
allow_remote_control yes        # yes | no | socket-only | password
listen_on unix:/tmp/mykitty
```

`allow_remote_control` 取值：`yes`（任意程序可控）、`no`（默认，禁用）、`socket-only`（仅 socket，控 tty 不行）、`password`（需密码 + 细粒度授权）。改配置后重开 Kitty，或在 Kitty 内 `kitty @ load-config`。

**密码模式**（`allow_remote_control password`）：`kitty.conf` 里配 `remote_control_password "<pw>" <action>...`，调用时带密码：

```bash
export KITTY_RC_PASSWORD=secret           # --password-env 默认读它
kitty-ops --password-env KITTY_RC_PASSWORD ls
kitty-ops --password secret ls            # 直接给会进 ps 列表，慎用
kitty-ops --password-file ~/.kitty-rc-pw ls
```

`--use-password always|if-available|never` 控制是否携带密码（透传 `kitten @`）。

## 全局选项（写在子命令前）

| 标志 | 用途 |
|------|------|
| `--to ADDR` | 覆盖 `KITTY_LISTEN_ON` |
| `--json` | 机器可读 stdout |
| `--dry-run` | 只打印将执行的 `kitten @`（stderr 或 JSON） |
| `--call-timeout SEC` | 单次 kitten 子进程超时（≠ `wait-until-text --timeout`） |
| `--password` / `--password-file` / `--password-env` | 密码模式鉴权；env 默认 `KITTY_RC_PASSWORD`（见上文） |
| `--use-password` | `always` / `if-available` / `never`，透传 `kitten @` |

子命令参数像全局标志时，用 `--`：

```bash
kitty-ops focus-window -- --match 'title:Claude Code'
```

## 命令地图

| 类别 | 命令 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| 诊断 | `doctor` | kitten、配置、能否 `ls` |
| 发现 | `discover` | `listen_on`、env、`/tmp` socket；`--probe` 测可达 |
| 等待 | `wait-until-text` | 轮询 `get-text` 直到含/不含子串 |
| 布局 | `ls` | OS 窗口 / tab / 窗格树；`--json` 透传 |
| 生命周期 | `launch`, `focus-window`, `focus-tab`, `close-window`, `close-tab` | 与 `kitten @` 同名 |
| 输入 | `send-text`, `send-key` | 支持 `--stdin` |
| 读取 | `get-text` | `--json` → `{"ok":true,"text":...}`；`--extent screen\|all\|last_cmd_output\|selection\|...` |
| 滚动 | `scroll-window` | 量词：`30`、`2p-`、`3u`、`end`；`--match` 须在量词**前**，见下文 |
| 标题 | `set-tab-title`, `set-window-title` | |

未列入 MVP 表的 `kitten @` 子命令仍会尝试转发；优先用上表。

## `--match` 配方

形式：`field:query`（与官方一致）。**先 `ls --json` 再写 match。**

字段（窗格）：`id` `title` `pid` `cwd` `cmdline` `num` `env` `var` `state` `neighbor` `recent`；特殊值 `all` 匹配全部。

- 数字字段 `id` `pid` `num` `recent` 按数值解析，其余按正则。`id:-1` = 最新创建的窗格；`recent:0` = 当前活动、`recent:1` = 上一个。
- `neighbor:left|right|top|bottom` 取活动窗格的相邻窗格。
- `state:` 取值：`active` `focused` `needs_attention` `parent_active` `parent_focused` `self` `overlay_parent`。
- `env:VAR` / `env:VAR=val`、`var:NAME` / `var:NAME=val`（窗格用户变量）。
- 布尔组合：`and` `or` `not` + 括号，如 `(id:2 or id:3) and not state:focused`。

```bash
kitty-ops send-text --match id:6 '你好'
kitty-ops send-text --match 'title:^Output' 'make'
kitty-ops focus-window --match 'recent:1'
kitty-ops get-text   --match 'cmdline:claude and state:parent_active' --json
```

标题含空格：引号或 `id:N`，不要裸写 `title:Claude Code` 被 shell 拆开。

## Agent 驱动终端编码代理（标准循环）

适用于 Kitty 内运行的 Claude Code / `kimicc` / `glmcc` 等：

```bash
WIN='id:6'   # 从 ls --json 取得

kitty-ops send-text --match "$WIN" '你的提示'
kitty-ops send-key --match "$WIN" Return

# 等运行结束：Claude Code 等 TUI 跑动时屏上有「esc to interrupt」类提示，消失即完成。
# （子串按实际 UI 先 get-text 核对；不存在则等自定义完成标记 --contains '<DONE>'）
kitty-ops wait-until-text --match "$WIN" --not-contains 'esc to interrupt' --timeout 300
# 选项：--extent screen|all|last_cmd_output（默认 screen）、--interval 0.5、--timeout 60

kitty-ops get-text --match "$WIN" --json | jq -r .text
```

**原则：**

1. 发提示 = `send-text` + `send-key Return`（多数 TUI 不会自动提交）。
2. 不要盲等固定 `sleep`；用 `wait-until-text` 或短 `--interval` 轮询。
3. 读全文用 `get-text --json`，便于 jq 截取；只要最后一条命令的输出用 `--extent last_cmd_output`。
4. 连接失败先 `doctor`，再 `discover --probe`。
5. `send-key` **永远退出 0**（kitten 不报告投递失败）；别拿它的退出码当「已送达」凭据，要确认就 `get-text` 回读。

## scroll-window 参数顺序（Kitty 0.36.x）

`scroll-window` **支持** `--match`，但量词必须放在 `--match`**之后**。顺序反了 kitten 解析器会报 `Must specify exactly 1 argument`：

```bash
kitty-ops scroll-window --match id:6 30      # ✅ 滚指定窗格，不改焦点
kitty-ops scroll-window 30 --match id:6      # ❌ 报错（量词在前）
```

量词：`30`（下 30 行）、`2p-`（上 2 页）、`0.5p`（下半页）、`3u`（unscroll，3 行从 scrollback 回到屏顶）、`start` / `end`。无 `--match` 时滚动**当前焦点**窗格。

不想记参数顺序时的等价兜底（**会切换焦点**，有副作用）：

```bash
kitty-ops focus-window --match id:6 && kitty-ops scroll-window 30
```

## `--json` 与退出码

- `ls --json`：stdout **仅** kitten 布局 JSON。
- `get-text --json`：`{"ok":true,"text":...,"stderr":null}`（取 `.text`）。
- `doctor` / `discover` / `wait-until-text`：结构化 JSON；失败 `{"ok":false,"error":...}`。
- 退出码：`0` 成功；`1` kitten 失败；`2` 用法；`3` 连接；`4` 无 kitten；`5` wait 超时。

脚本判断：

```bash
kitty-ops doctor || exit 3
kitty-ops wait-until-text --match id:6 --contains 'done' --timeout 60 || exit 5
```

## 排错清单

| 症状 | 动作 |
|------|------|
| `doctor` 非 0 | 读 stderr；查 `allow_remote_control`、是否需 `KITTY_LISTEN_ON` |
| match 无窗格 | `ls --json` 换 `id:` 或 `cmdline:` |
| `scroll-window` 报 `Must specify exactly 1 argument` | 量词放到 `--match` 后：`scroll-window --match id:6 30` |
| 全局 `--timeout` 抢子命令参数 | 全局用 `--call-timeout`；等待用 `wait-until-text --timeout` |
| `discover --probe` 慢 | 大量 `/tmp/kitty-*` 误报；用 `--no-scan` 或只设 `KITTY_LISTEN_ON` |
| 需要视觉确认 | `macbot screenshot`（`use-macbot`） |

## 开发 / 测试

```bash
cd ~/projects/models/kitty-ops
uv run kitty-ops doctor
just test
just e2e    # 需要本机 Kitty
```

测试覆盖使用 `KITTY_OPS_KITTEN` 指向假 kitten；不要假设已安装 `just install`。

## 相关

- **tmux 窗格**（不是 Kitty）：`use-tmux-ops` → `~/projects/models/tmux-ops`
- **WezTerm**：`use-wezterm-ops` → `~/projects/models/wezterm-ops`
- GUI 自动化：`use-macbot`
- 终端编码代理选型：`use-code-agents`

## References

改 CLI、契约或实现时，先改下列 `~/projects/<lang>/<repo>/` 路径，再同步本 skill 正文。

| 用途 | 路径 |
|------|------|
| 仓库根 | `~/projects/models/kitty-ops` |
| 实现 | `~/projects/models/kitty-ops/src/` |
| 构建 / 测试 | `~/projects/models/kitty-ops/justfile` |
| 项目 Agent 说明 | `~/projects/models/kitty-ops/CLAUDE.md` |
| 人类文档 | `~/projects/models/kitty-ops/README.md` |
| 设计 | `~/projects/models/kitty-ops/docs/design/` |
| 本 skill | `~/projects/skills/use-kitty/SKILL.md` |

name: use-lit-parser
body:
# Use LiteParse (`lit`)

LiteParse is the run-llama local document parser. Its CLI is `lit`; source is
`https://github.com/run-llama/liteparse`. It parses PDFs and converted document
formats, can run bundled Tesseract OCR by default, and can generate page
screenshots.

## Core Rules

- Prefer an existing `lit` binary if present. If missing, build from a temporary
  checkout or install from Cargo; do not vendor LiteParse into the user's current
  repo.
- Use `--no-ocr` for fast text-PDF extraction when OCR is not needed.
- Omit `--no-ocr` when testing OCR/Tesseract or parsing scanned/image-heavy input.
- Always write non-trivial output with `-o <path>` and verify the output exists,
  is non-empty, and looks plausible.
- Quote file paths. Use absolute paths when invoking `lit` from another working
  directory.
- For screenshots, verify the PNG exists with `file` or image inspection.

## Prerequisites

```bash
which lit || cargo install liteparse
lit --help
```

For testing the upstream repo without installing globally:

```bash
rm -rf /tmp/liteparse-test
git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/run-llama/liteparse /tmp/liteparse-test
cd /tmp/liteparse-test
cargo run -p liteparse --bin lit -- --help
```

## Common Commands

```bash
# Fast PDF text extraction, no OCR
lit parse input.pdf --no-ocr --format text -o output.txt

# Structured JSON with bounding boxes
lit parse input.pdf --no-ocr --format json -o output.json

# OCR/Tesseract path: leave OCR enabled
lit parse scan-or-image.png --format json -o ocr.json
lit parse scanned.pdf --format json -o ocr.json

# Select pages
lit parse input.pdf --no-ocr --target-pages "1-5,10" --format json -o pages.json

# Screenshot one or more pages
lit screenshot input.pdf --target-pages "1,3" -o screenshots/

# Batch parse a directory
lit batch-parse ./input-dir ./output-dir --format json
```

Equivalent upstream-checkout form:

```bash
cargo run -p liteparse --bin lit -- parse input.pdf --no-ocr --format json -o output.json
cargo run -p liteparse --bin lit -- parse scan.png --format json -o ocr.json
```

Use `--no-default-features` only when you deliberately want to avoid compiling
bundled Tesseract:

```bash
cargo run -p liteparse --no-default-features --bin lit -- \
  parse input.pdf --no-ocr --format json -o output.json
```

## Verify Output

For JSON:

```bash
python3 - <<'PY'
import json, sys
path = sys.argv[1]
data = json.load(open(path))
pages = data.get("pages") or []
print("pages", len(pages))
for i, page in enumerate(pages[:3], 1):
    items = page.get("text_items") or []
    text = page.get("text") or ""
    print("page", i, "text_len", len(text), "items", len(items))
    print(text[:300].replace("\n", " | "))
PY output.json
```

For OCR, additionally check that items carry OCR-style confidence/bbox fields:

```bash
python3 - <<'PY'
import json, sys
data = json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))
items = [x for p in data.get("pages", []) for x in (p.get("text_items") or [])]
ocr_like = [x for x in items if x.get("confidence") is not None]
print("items", len(items), "ocr_like_items", len(ocr_like))
if ocr_like:
    print({k: ocr_like[0].get(k) for k in sorted(ocr_like[0].keys())})
PY ocr.json
```

For text:

```bash
wc -c output.txt
sed -n '1,40p' output.txt
```

For screenshots:

```bash
find screenshots -type f -name '*.png' -maxdepth 1 -print
file screenshots/page_1.png
```

## Known Behavior

- Default features compile `tesseract-rs` and may be slow on first build.
- On macOS, bundled Tesseract data may appear under:
  `~/Library/Application Support/tesseract-rs/tessdata`.
- OCR quality is suitable for basic local extraction, but complex scanned
  documents, dense tables, handwriting, and charts may require a stronger parser.
- JSON top-level output is usually `{ "pages": [...] }`; page text lives under
  each page's `text` field.

## When Not To Use

- For the user's existing `docparse`/MinerU parsing workflow, use
  `parse-document`.
- For editing documents in place, use `edit-office-document`.
- For pure speech/audio transcription, use `use-asr`.

name: use-llama-cpp
description: Use when running local LLMs with llama.cpp on this Mac — mentions llama-server / llama-cli / llama-mtmd-cli / llama-gguf-split, GGUF models, "run a model locally", Metal/GPU offload, MTP / speculative decoding; when finding or downloading a GGUF model from Hugging Face (trending, quant choice, `-hf` download); or when reusing Ollama's already-downloaded weights (`ollama-gguf`, `~/.ollama/models/blobs`) with llama.cpp instead of re-downloading.
body:
# Use llama.cpp (local GGUF inference)

Locally built from source at `~/projects/models/llama.cpp` (Metal + Accelerate BLAS + curl).
Binaries installed to `~/sync/bin_arm64/`. Machine is an **Apple M1 Ultra, 128GB** — it
runs 27B–70B at Q4 comfortably; don't default to tiny models. PaddlePaddle models
(e.g. PaddleOCR-VL) have no Metal path and are unrelated to this skill.

## ⚠️ PATH gotcha — read first

An older **homebrew `/opt/homebrew/bin/llama-server`** sits *before* `~/sync/bin_arm64`
on PATH and shadows the source build. It rejects the new `-hf REPO:QUANT` syntax (prints
help and exits). **Always invoke by full path** `~/sync/bin_arm64/llama-server`, or run
`brew uninstall llama.cpp` once to remove the shadow.

| binary | use |
|--------|-----|
| `llama-server` | OpenAI-compatible HTTP server — **default for everything** (chat + scripting) |
| `llama-cli` | interactive terminal chat (conversational by default; `-no-cnv` was removed) |
| `llama-mtmd-cli` | multimodal CLI (vision, needs an `mmproj` GGUF) |
| `llama-gguf-split` | merge/split sharded GGUF (large quants ship split) |

## Quick start — run a model

```bash
# auto-download from HF and serve (first run downloads the quant)
~/sync/bin_arm64/llama-server -hf openbmb/MiniCPM5-1B-GGUF:Q8_0 -c 8192 --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8080

# health + a chat request (OpenAI-compatible)
curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8080/health
curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8080/v1/chat/completions -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"你好"}],"max_tokens":200}' | jq '.choices[0].message'
```

- Reasoning models put output in `message.reasoning_content` until the think block closes
  — give enough `max_tokens` or `content` comes back empty (`finish_reason:"length"`).
- For one-shot scripted generation, prefer the server API above. `llama-cli` is interactive;
  build the `llama-completion` target if you need a non-interactive CLI.
- Metal offload is automatic; confirm in server log: `device_info … MTL0 : Apple M1 Ultra`.

### MTP / speculative decoding (1.5–2× faster, no accuracy loss)

For models shipping MTP draft weights (e.g. `unsloth/Qwen3.6-27B-MTP-GGUF`):

```bash
~/sync/bin_arm64/llama-server -hf unsloth/Qwen3.6-27B-MTP-GGUF:UD-Q4_K_XL \
  -c 8192 --spec-type draft-mtp --spec-draft-n-max 2
```

`--mmproj` (vision) and `-np > 1` are **not** supported together with MTP — pick one.

## Find & download a GGUF model from Hugging Face

Search the live API for **trending GGUF repos** (these are llama.cpp-runnable — LLMs/VLMs,
not diffusion/TTS). The `hf-trending` CLI (`~/sync/bin/`) wraps this; or hit the API directly:

```bash
# trending GGUF text-generation repos
curl -s "https://huggingface.co/api/models?filter=gguf&pipeline_tag=text-generation&sort=trendingScore&direction=-1&limit=30" \
  | jq -r '.[] | "\(.trendingScore)\t\(.id)"'

# list a repo's quant files + sizes (pick what fits RAM)
curl -s "https://huggingface.co/api/models/<repo>/tree/main?recursive=true" \
  | jq -r '.[]|select(.path|test("\\.gguf$"))|"\(.size/1073741824|floor)GB\t\(.path)"' | sort -n
```

**Choosing a quant** (download via `llama-server -hf <repo>:<TAG>`):

| tag | meaning |
|-----|---------|
| `Q4_K_M` | best size/quality default for most models |
| `Q8_0` | near-lossless; pick for tiny (≤2B) models where Q4 hurts |
| `UD-*` (e.g. `UD-Q4_K_XL`) | **Unsloth Dynamic** — better quality at same size, prefer when present |
| `IQ2_*` / `Q2_K` | only when memory-starved; quality drops |

Rule of thumb: model fits if quant file size + KV cache < usable memory. On the 128GB
M1 Ultra, Q4 of a 27B (~16GB) leaves huge headroom. VLMs also need the `mmproj-*.gguf`.

## Reuse Ollama's downloaded weights (no re-download)

Ollama stores models as **GGUF blobs** at `~/.ollama/models/blobs/sha256-…` (no extension;
the manifest's `image.model` layer points to the weight). They run directly in llama.cpp.

```bash
ollama-gguf -l                                   # list local Ollama models
ollama-gguf qwen3.6:latest                       # -> /Users/.../blobs/sha256-…
~/sync/bin_arm64/llama-server -m "$(ollama-gguf qwen3.6:latest)" -c 8192   # run it
```

`ollama-gguf` is installed at `~/sync/bin/` (source bundled in [scripts/ollama-gguf](scripts/ollama-gguf)).
Caveat: running the raw blob uses the chat template embedded in the GGUF; Ollama's
Modelfile system prompt / params (separate `image.template` / `image.params` layers) are
**not** applied.

## Rebuild llama.cpp (when updating)

```bash
cd ~/projects/models/llama.cpp && git fetch --depth 1 origin && git reset --hard origin/HEAD
cmake -B build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DGGML_METAL=ON -DLLAMA_CURL=ON -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=OFF
cmake --build build -j 20 --target llama-cli llama-mtmd-cli llama-server llama-gguf-split
cp build/bin/llama-cli build/bin/llama-server build/bin/llama-mtmd-cli build/bin/llama-gguf-split ~/sync/bin_arm64/
```

## More

End-to-end recipes (find→download→run, Ollama reuse, MTP, vision, server API): see [EXAMPLES.md](EXAMPLES.md).
Install the bundled resolver with `just install`; verify the build with `just check-binaries`.

## References

| 用途 | 路径 |
|------|------|
| llama.cpp 源码/构建 | `~/projects/models/llama.cpp` |
| 编译产物 | `~/sync/bin_arm64/llama-{cli,server,mtmd-cli,gguf-split}` |
| Ollama 解析器 | `~/sync/bin/ollama-gguf`(本 skill `scripts/ollama-gguf`) |
| HF 趋势工具 | `~/sync/bin/hf-trending` |
| Ollama 模型库 | `~/.ollama/models/{manifests,blobs}` |

name: use-macbot
description: Use when the user wants to drive macOS GUI automation from the command line via `macbot` — activating apps, clicking buttons, typing text, taking screenshots, locating UI elements through Accessibility / vision / OCR, waiting for windows or focus to change, reading clipboard / menus / file dialogs, or composing repeatable shell pipelines for LLM-agent-driven UI tasks. Covers AX locator DSL, event-driven waits (`wait focus / value / window-appear`), Electron-aware `ui set` verification, stable `pathHint` element handles, screenshot + vision grounding, OCR text click, and the `~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot` binary contract. For driving a specific app (Doubao / ChatGPT Desktop / Zhihu), prefer that app's dedicated skill — this is the foundation under all of them.
body:
# 用 macbot 做 macOS GUI 自动化

`macbot` 是一个 JSON-first 的 macOS GUI 自动化 CLI，二进制装在 `~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot`（PATH 可达，命令就是 `macbot`）。这个 skill 教你怎么把它的各个原子能力组装成稳定可重放的脚本与 agent pipeline。

不要把 macbot 想成一个会"看屏幕的机器人"——把它想成一组每条返回 JSON 的 shell 工具，组合起来就是你的 GUI 控制层。

## 适用场景

- 写 LLM agent skill / 自动化脚本驱动任意 macOS 应用（Chrome、Safari、ChatGPT.app、豆包、终端、Finder…）
- 在 CI / cron 里跑无头 GUI 流程，截图验证 + JSON 解析
- 半交互式调试：截屏 → grounding → 点击 → 再截屏验证
- 替换 AppleScript / pyautogui 写的脆弱脚本

## 必读：JSON envelope 契约

所有 `--json` 输出都是这个形状：

```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "ts": "2026-05-17T10:57:36.059Z",
  "command": "ui query",
  "schemaVersion": "2",
  "data": <command-specific payload>
}
```

失败时：

```json
{
  "ok": false,
  "ts": "...",
  "command": "...",
  "schemaVersion": "2",
  "error": {
    "code": "ax_error",
    "message": "...",
    "category": "automation",
    "details": "...",
    "recoverable": false,
    "suggestedAction": "..."
  }
}
```

**stdout 永远只是 JSON**；warning、progress、debug 都走 stderr。所以 pipeline 可以稳定 `| jq ...`。

退出码：`0` 成功，`1` 失败，`124` 超时（`wait` 系列），`64` 参数错误（argument-parser 默认）。

## 前置检查（每次会话开头）

```bash
# 1. 权限自检（Accessibility / Screen Recording / Input Monitoring）
macbot permissions check --json | jq

# 2. 工具体检（OpenCV / 输入设备 / 显示器拓扑）
macbot doctor --json | jq
```

如果某项权限没给，会在 JSON 里指明该到「系统设置 → 隐私与安全性 → 辅助功能」里勾哪个 app。一次性事情，但每个 fresh user / fresh macOS 都要做。

## 命令地图（拣最常用的）

| 类别       | 子命令                                                 | 一句话                                       |
| ---------- | ------------------------------------------------------ | -------------------------------------------- |
| 应用       | `app activate / list / quit / hide`                    | 切换前台、列举运行中、退出                   |
| 窗口       | `window list / focus / move / resize / close / layout` | 操作窗口几何与焦点                           |
| 键盘       | `keyboard type / tap / hotkey`                         | 文本输入、单键、组合键                       |
| 鼠标       | `mouse click / drag / move`                            | 点击、拖拽、移动                             |
| 截图       | `screenshot screen / window / region / monitor`        | 抓图、读显示器拓扑                           |
| Grounding  | `ground --image / --screen`                            | 视觉 LLM 定位 UI 元素                        |
| OCR        | `text find / click`                                    | OCR 找文字、点击文字                         |
| 图标       | `locate-icon / click-icon / drag-icon`                 | OpenCV 模板匹配                              |
| AX 查询    | `ui tree / query / find / snapshot`                    | 访问性树读取、selector / locator 查询        |
| AX 动作    | `ui click / set / wait / click-id / set-id`            | 通过 AX 点击/写值/等待                       |
| AX 通用    | `ui actions / attrs / attr / perform / set-attr`       | 列动作、读属性、白名单内执行                 |
| 等待 (旧)  | `wait app / window / text / icon / pixel / stable`     | 轮询条件                                     |
| 等待 (新)  | `wait focus / value / window-appear`                   | **AX 事件驱动**，比 `sleep` 快也比轮询省     |
| 监听       | `watch app / window / ui / event`                      | 长驻流式订阅                                 |
| 剪贴板     | `clipboard set / get / list`                           | 中文 / 长文本走剪贴板比 type 稳              |
| Space      | `space number / mission-control`                       | 切虚拟桌面（多 Space 时关键）                |
| 菜单       | `menu click "App>File>Save"`                           | 路径式菜单触发                               |
| Grid       | `grid render`                                          | 把屏幕打格让 agent 自己选落点（不调 LLM）    |

完整列表用 `macbot --help`，每个子命令也都有 `macbot <cmd> --help` + Examples。

## 元素定位的三条路径

GUI 自动化的核心问题是「我要点哪儿」。macbot 提供三条互补路径，按优先级和场景选：

### A. AX 路径（首选，最稳）

通过 macOS Accessibility API 直接读 UI 树。返回是结构化的、可校验的、不依赖像素。

```bash
# 1) 看树（带 stderr 截断诊断）
macbot ui tree --app com.google.Chrome --depth 5 --json | jq '.data'

# 2) 用 locator DSL 查（推荐写法）
macbot ui query --app com.google.Chrome \
  --locator '{"criteria":[{"attribute":"role","value":"AXButton","matchType":"exact"},
                          {"attribute":"title","value":"Reload","matchType":"contains"}]}' \
  --json | jq '.data[0]'

# 3) 直接点击 / 写值
macbot ui click --app com.google.Chrome \
  --locator '{"criteria":[{"attribute":"title","value":"Reload"}]}'
```

什么时候用 AX 失败：Chrome / VS Code / Slack 等 Electron 应用的内层渲染器对 AX 暴露不全（DOM 控件常无 title），这时回退到 B 或 C。

### B. 视觉 grounding（最灵活，最贵）

把屏幕截图 + 自然语言 prompt 发给视觉 LLM，回归一化坐标，再换算为屏幕像素。

```bash
# 直接截屏并 grounding
macbot ground --screen 1 --prompt '定位 Chrome 工具栏的刷新按钮，以<point>x y</point>的形式返回' --json \
  | jq '.data.points[0]'

# 拿坐标后点击（注意 ground 返回的 screen_logical 才是直接可点的）
read X Y <<< $(macbot ground --screen 1 --prompt '...' --json | jq -r '.data.points[0] | "\(.screen_logical.x) \(.screen_logical.y)"')
macbot mouse click --x "$X" --y "$Y"
```

什么时候必用 grounding：B 选项的应用（Electron / 内嵌 WebView / 完全自绘 canvas）；或目标元素在 AX 里有但描述不稳定（动态生成的 id）。

代价：每次调用 1~3s + token 钱。在循环里不要无脑用。

### C. OCR / 文字点击（中间档）

`text find` / `text click` 用 Vision 框架的 OCR，找文字就点。比 grounding 快、不收费，但只能点「文字」。

```bash
# 在当前窗口找包含「保存」的位置
macbot text find --window --bundle com.apple.TextEdit --text '保存' --json | jq

# 直接点击文字
macbot text click --window --bundle com.apple.TextEdit '保存'
```

### D. 旁路：grid（agent 自挑落点，零调用）

适合给 LLM 同时看「打了网格的截图 + 当前 UI 描述」，让它自己说「点 D7」。这条路在用 LLM agent 时常常比 grounding 还便宜稳定。

```bash
macbot grid render --screen 1 --rows 16 --cols 12 --path /tmp/grid.png --json
# 把 grid.png + 任务 prompt 喂给 LLM，让它返回 "D7"，再换算坐标点击
```

## Locator DSL 速查（最近接入到 ui click / set / wait / query）

```json
{
  "criteria": [
    {"attribute": "role",  "value": "AXButton"},
    {"attribute": "title", "value": "Save,Submit,OK", "matchType": "containsAny"}
  ],
  "matchAll": true,
  "pathFromRoot": [
    {"criteria": [{"attribute": "role", "value": "AXWindow"}]},
    {"criteria": [{"attribute": "subrole", "value": "AXDialog"}]}
  ],
  "requireAction": "AXPress",
  "computedNameContains": "save"
}
```

要点：

- `attribute` 接受短名（`role / title / id / dom / desc / placeholder / url …`）或完整 `AX*` 名
- `matchType`: `exact` (默认) / `contains` / `containsAny` / `prefix` / `suffix` / `regex`
- `pathFromRoot`：先约束祖先链，再在最深 scope 里匹配 criteria，最有效避免误中同名兄弟节点
- `requireAction`：只接受能执行某动作的元素（典型：`AXPress`）

**`--locator-file -` 可读 stdin**：

```bash
echo '{"criteria":[{"attribute":"title","value":"OK"}]}' \
  | macbot ui click --app com.apple.dialogs --locator-file -
```

老的 `--selector` 还在，新代码请直接用 `--locator`。

## 元素稳定句柄：`pathHint`

`ui query / ui focused-element / ui snapshot` 返回的每个元素都带 `pathHint`：

```text
AXApplication "Chrome" > AXWindow "Tab Title" > AXToolbar > AXButton "Reload"
```

为什么重要：`ui tree` 也返回 `id: "e_42"` 这种顺序号，但下一次重建树时同一节点可能变成 `e_45` —— 顺序号不稳定。`pathHint` 由 role / subrole / title / identifier / domIdentifier 拼成，对 UI 重排免疫。

实践建议：

- agent 把上一步的 `pathHint` 持久化下来；下一步用它生成新 locator 的 `pathFromRoot`
- 不要把 `e_*` id 跨命令传，**它会指错节点**

## 用事件驱动 wait 干掉 `sleep 0.3`

老代码到处是 `sleep 0.5` `sleep 1` 这种盲等，又慢又脆。新的事件驱动 wait 走 `AXObserverCenter`，事件一来立刻继续：

```bash
# 等焦点元素变成文本框
macbot wait focus --bundle com.google.Chrome --role AXTextField --timeout 5000

# 等地址栏的 AXValue 改成 https://… 开头
macbot wait value --bundle com.google.Chrome \
  --locator '{"criteria":[{"attribute":"role","value":"AXTextField"}]}' \
  --match '^https://' --timeout 8000

# 等下载窗口出现
macbot wait window-appear --bundle com.google.Chrome --title 'Downloads' --timeout 6000
```

超时退出码是 `124`（GNU `timeout` 同款）。每次内部会先 eager-check，已满足直接返回 0；不满足则订阅对应 AX 通知 + 兜底 200ms 重检（Electron 偶尔吞通知）。

老的 polling `wait` 系列（`wait app / window / text / icon / pixel / stable`）也都保留，对 grounding / OCR / 像素这类不能事件化的场景仍是首选。

## `ui set` 的 Electron 隐藏陷阱（已自动检测）

`ui set --value "..."` 写 AXValue 后，**默认会回读校验**。如果 AX 报 `set: true` 但 read-back 不等于你写的值（典型：Electron / WebKit DOM 控件不响应合成 AXValue），envelope 里会带 verification 字段：

```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "data": {
    "found": true,
    "set": true,
    "verification": {
      "readBack": "",
      "matched": false,
      "warning": "set returned success but read-back differs... use ui click + keyboard type, or clipboard paste, instead."
    }
  }
}
```

同样的 warning 也会写到 stderr。`--no-verify` 关闭回读。

工程建议：检测到 warning → 回退到「点击聚焦 + 剪贴板粘贴」：

```bash
macbot ui click --locator '{"criteria":[{"attribute":"role","value":"AXTextField"}]}' --app com.google.Chrome
macbot clipboard set "$VALUE"
macbot keyboard hotkey cmd+v
```

## 多 Space / 多显示器要点

- 应用可能在另一个 Space，截图会拿到当前 Space 而非应用：先 `macbot app activate --bundle X`，再 `sleep 0.5`，再截图
- 多显示器时，ground 返回三种坐标：`normalized_1000`（建议留底）、`screen_logical`（直接点）、`screen_pixel`（除以 scale 才能点）
- `macbot screenshot monitor --json` 拿到完整的显示器拓扑（scale、rotation、pixelWidth）。**注意**：旧版裸 `screenshot monitor --json` 会 exit 64，新版已支持等价于 `screenshot monitor list --json`

## 端到端范式：浏览器搜索 + 抓结果

```bash
# 1) 切到 Chrome（含 Space 切换）
macbot app activate --bundle com.google.Chrome
macbot wait focus --bundle com.google.Chrome --timeout 3000

# 2) 用剪贴板填地址栏（避免中文输入法）
macbot keyboard hotkey cmd+l
macbot clipboard set 'https://www.baidu.com/s?wd=南京天气'
macbot keyboard hotkey cmd+v
macbot keyboard tap return

# 3) 等加载完成（事件驱动 + URL 正则）
macbot wait value --bundle com.google.Chrome \
  --locator '{"criteria":[{"attribute":"role","value":"AXTextField"}]}' \
  --match '南京天气' --timeout 8000

# 4) 截图局部区域（5K 全屏太大喂不进 LLM）
macbot screenshot region --x 0 --y 25 --width 1200 --height 800 \
  --path /tmp/result.png --main

# 5) grounding 取关键信息位置
macbot ground --image /tmp/result.png \
  --prompt '定位第一条搜索结果中的温度数字，以<point>x y</point>表示' --json
```

## 调试与失败恢复

每一步失败先做这件事：截图 + 看 stderr：

```bash
macbot screenshot window --bundle <app> --path /tmp/dbg.png 2>/tmp/err.log
echo "--- err ---" && cat /tmp/err.log
```

常见症状 → 处理：

- AX 报 `-25204`（cannot complete）：目标应用没启动 / 在另一个 Space / 应用刚启动还没暴露 AX；`app activate` + 等 0.5s
- `ui tree` 输出小或缺关键节点：Electron 应用，subrole 失踪；要么 `--locator` 用 `pathFromRoot` 精确锁定，要么回退 grounding
- `ui set` 报 ok 但 UI 没变：见上文 verification 段；改用 click + clipboard + paste
- ground 返回坐标点不到：检查是不是用了 `screen_pixel`（Retina 像素），应该用 `screen_logical`

`stderr` 关键日志：

- `truncated: max_depth,max_nodes` ← tree 被预算限制了，加 `--depth 8` 或 `--max-nodes`
- `warning: --value 已弃用` ← 用 `wait value` 时改用 `--match`
- AX subscribe failed ← 应用刚启动还没完全有 AX 主权，重试

## 不要做这些

- 不要把 `ui tree` 返回的 `e_42` 跨命令复用 —— 用 `pathHint` 或 locator
- 不要在循环里高频调 `ground` —— 1-3s 每次，先用 AX / OCR 试
- 不要给中文 / 长文本 / 包含特殊键盘字符的 prompt 用 `keyboard type` —— 用 clipboard + cmd+v
- 不要假设 `sleep 0.3` 够稳定 —— 改 `wait focus / value / window-appear`
- 不要在 `--json` 输出里夹自由文本 ——「stdout 是数据，stderr 是日志」
- 不要忽略 `verification.warning` —— Electron 写值经常静默失败

## 工作流模板：让 agent 自驱

LLM agent 调 macbot 的最稳套路：

1. **观察**：`ui tree` / `screenshot region` 拿当前状态
2. **决策**：把 tree 或截图喂 LLM，问下一步该点哪儿（grounding 或 locator 形式）
3. **执行**：`ui click --locator ...` 或 `mouse click --x --y`
4. **等待**：`wait focus / value / window-appear` 而不是 sleep
5. **验证**：再次 `screenshot` / `ui query`，对比预期；不符就回到第 2 步
6. **错误回退**：AX 失败 → grounding → grid 旁路 → 报错给用户

每一步都用 `--json | jq` 拼，stdout 永远是结构化数据，retries 写成 shell 循环。

## 重要文件 / 路径

- 二进制：`~/sync/bin_arm64/macbot`（已加入 PATH）
- 源码：`~/projects/models/macbot/`
- 项目约定（permissions、bundle id、Space）：`~/projects/models/macbot/CLAUDE.md`
- 子命令完整 reference：`macbot <cmd> --help`，每个都有中文 Examples 段

## References

改 CLI、契约或实现时，先改下列 `~/projects/<lang>/<repo>/` 路径，再同步本 skill 正文。

| 用途 | 路径 |
|------|------|
| 仓库根 | `~/projects/models/macbot` |
| 构建 / 测试 | `~/projects/models/macbot/justfile` |
| 项目 Agent 说明 | `~/projects/models/macbot/CLAUDE.md` |
| 人类文档 | `~/projects/models/macbot/README.md` |
| 本 skill | `~/projects/skills/use-macbot/SKILL.md` |

name: use-moss
description: Use when the user wants high-quality multilingual text-to-speech or zero-shot voice cloning from the local MOSS-TTS-v1.5 model (8B, 31 languages) via the `moss-tts` CLI — \"use moss\", \"moss tts\", \"用 moss 播报\", \"moss 克隆我的声音\", explicit-pause / pinyin / IPA / duration-controlled Chinese+English speech, or cloning a person's voice from a reference clip with strong Mandarin quality. CLI: `~/projects/models/moss-tts` (`uv run moss-tts` / installed `~/sync/bin/moss-tts`). Needs locally-downloaded weights (ModelScope) + a codec model. For fast preset-voice narration use `use-tts`; to choose among ALL clone tools use `clone-voice`; for the model download use `download-models-from-modelscope`.
body:
# Use MOSS-TTS-v1.5 (the `moss-tts` CLI)

`moss-tts` wraps **OpenMOSS MOSS-TTS-v1.5** — an 8B, 31-language TTS model with
zero-shot voice cloning, duration control, explicit `[pause Ns]`, and pinyin/IPA
input. Source: `~/projects/models/moss-tts`. Run via `uv run moss-tts …` (in that
dir) or the installed launcher `~/sync/bin/moss-tts`.

> **When to reach for this vs siblings.** `use-tts` (`tts-rs`) is the default for
> fast preset-voice narration (warm daemon). Use **moss-tts** when you want
> MOSS's quality/multilingual range, its `[pause]`/pinyin/IPA controls, or to
> **clone a voice** with strong Mandarin. To pick among *all* clone stacks
> (CosyVoice3 / VoxCPM2 / OmniVoice / MOSS), see **`clone-voice`**.

## One-time setup: weights (large)

The model is **~16 GB** (4 safetensors shards) + a **~6.6 GB** audio-tokenizer
codec. HF can stall in China — **ModelScope is far faster** (~1 GB/min). See
`download-models-from-modelscope`. Verified ModelScope ids:

```bash
cd ~/projects/models/moss-tts && uv sync --extra modelscope

uv run modelscope download --model OpenMOSS/MOSS-TTS-v1.5 \
    --local_dir ~/models/MOSS-TTS-v1.5            # ~16 GB

uv run modelscope download --model OpenMOSS/MOSS-Audio-Tokenizer \
    --local_dir ~/models/MOSS-Audio-Tokenizer     # ~6.6 GB, REQUIRED
```

> Note the ids differ from the HF org: HF is `OpenMOSS-Team/…`; ModelScope is
> `OpenMOSS/…`. Verify completeness with `du -sh` (not just exit 0).

Point the CLI at the local dirs with `--model` / `--codec-path`, or export once:

```bash
export MOSS_TTS_MODEL=~/models/MOSS-TTS-v1.5
export MOSS_TTS_CODEC_PATH=~/models/MOSS-Audio-Tokenizer
```

(The installed `~/sync/bin/moss-tts` launcher already exports these.)

## Synthesize

```bash
# Plain — synthesize and play aloud
moss-tts "你好，世界。" -o /tmp/out.wav --play

# Without the env vars, pass the weights explicitly:
moss-tts "你好" --model ~/models/MOSS-TTS-v1.5 --codec-path ~/models/MOSS-Audio-Tokenizer -o /tmp/out.wav --play

# From a file
moss-tts -f script.txt -o out.wav

# Multilingual (a language tag stabilises non-English)
moss-tts "Bonjour le monde." --language French -o fr.wav --play

# Duration control (approx, in audio tokens)
moss-tts "A slower, longer delivery." --tokens 600 -o slow.wav

# Inline controls: explicit pause + pinyin/IPA
moss-tts "我学了一首古诗，名字是[pause 1.5s]静夜思！" -o pause.wav
moss-tts "nin2 hao3，huan1 ying2" -o pinyin.wav   # pinyin with tone numbers
```

## Voice cloning (zero-shot)

Give a clean reference clip (≤30s, one speaker) with `-r` (repeatable; path or URL):

```bash
moss-tts "用我的音色说这句新的话。" -r ~/myvoice.wav -o clone.wav --play
```

Reference quality dominates. WAV/FLAC/OGG reference clips work directly (any
sample rate — resampled internally). To record/transcribe a reference, see
`clone-voice` / `use-asr`.

## Device / speed (Apple Silicon)

- `--device auto` (default) picks CUDA > MPS > CPU. CUDA is the model's primary
  target; on an Ampere+ GPU add FlashAttention 2 (`uv pip install -e ".[flash-attn]"`).
- **Apple Silicon: use `--device mps`** — ~12 it/s on an M1 Ultra vs ~0.9 it/s on
  CPU (~13×). Prefix `PYTORCH_ENABLE_MPS_FALLBACK=1`. The engine auto-runs the
  model's `torch.topk` sampler on CPU (it's MPS-buggy) while the 8B transformer
  stays on MPS — no action needed.
- Output is 24 kHz mono 16-bit WAV. Generation stops at EOS well before the 4096
  `--max-new-tokens` cap (a ~10 s line ≈ 130–180 steps).

```bash
PYTORCH_ENABLE_MPS_FALLBACK=1 moss-tts "全部完成，测试通过。" --device mps -o /tmp/done.wav --play
```

## Options

| Flag | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| `text` / `-f` | text, or read from a file |
| `-o` | output WAV (default `output.wav`) |
| `-p, --play` | play aloud after synth (afplay/aplay/ffplay) |
| `-r, --reference` | reference clip(s) for cloning (path/URL, repeatable) |
| `-l, --language` | language tag, e.g. `French` |
| `--tokens` | approx duration in audio tokens |
| `--max-new-tokens` | gen cap (default 4096) |
| `--model` / `--codec-path` | weights dirs (or `$MOSS_TTS_MODEL` / `$MOSS_TTS_CODEC_PATH`) |
| `--device` | `auto` / `cuda` / `mps` / `cpu` |

## Gotchas (learned the hard way)

- **The codec is mandatory.** Without `--codec-path` (or `$MOSS_TTS_CODEC_PATH`)
  the processor tries to pull `OpenMOSS-Team/MOSS-Audio-Tokenizer` from HF and stalls.
- **No TorchCodec/ffmpeg needed.** torchaudio 2.x routes `load`/`save` through
  TorchCodec; the engine sidesteps this (stdlib WAV write + `soundfile` reference
  load). If you see a `TorchCodec is required` error, you're on an older build —
  `uv sync` to pick up the fix.
- **MPS topk crash** (`size of tensor a (25) must match b (1025)`): expected on raw
  MPS; the engine's CPU-sampling patch handles it. Don't "fix" by forcing CPU.
- Loading from a local dir can throw `FileNotFoundError` for a
  `transformers_modules/.../tts_robust_normalizer_single_script.py`; the engine
  self-heals by re-co-locating the custom `.py` files. No action needed.

name: use-ocr
description: Use when the user wants to extract text from images, locate text positions, highlight matches, batch-process images, or run OCR via the local `ocr` CLI (backed by Tesseract or Ollama/GLM-OCR). Triggers include "ocr this image", "extract text", "find text in screenshot", "highlight matches", "mark text", "batch ocr", "run ocr", "use glm-ocr", "use ollama for ocr", "ocr with ollama", "recognize text", "ocr doctor", `ocr` CLI usage questions.
body:
# use-ocr

CLI: `ocr` — installed at `~/sync/bin_arm64/ocr` (ARM64) or `~/sync/bin_x86/ocr` (x86).
Source: `~/projects/models/ocr-rs`. Build with `just install` from that directory.

## Backends

| Backend | Flag | Requirement |
|---|---|---|
| Tesseract (default) | `--backend tesseract` | system `tesseract` + language packs |
| Ollama / GLM-OCR | `--backend ollama` | `ollama serve` running locally |

`--backend` must come **after** the subcommand name:
```
ocr extract image.png --backend ollama   ✓
ocr --backend ollama extract image.png   ✗  (parses as legacy image path)
```

Ollama env vars (all optional):
- `OLLAMA_HOST` — default `http://localhost:11434`
- `OLLAMA_MODEL` — default `glm-ocr`
- `OLLAMA_TASK` — default `Text Recognition:` (also: `Formula Recognition:`, `Table Recognition:`)

On first use, the Ollama backend auto-pulls the model if not installed.

## Subcommands

### extract — OCR text from an image

```bash
ocr extract image.png                        # plain text to stdout
ocr extract image.png --json                 # structured JSON with bounding boxes
ocr extract image.png --plain                # text, no decoration
ocr extract image.png --backend ollama       # use GLM-OCR via Ollama
cat image.png | ocr extract - --json         # stdin (use `-` for path)
ocr extract image.png --language eng         # force language (Tesseract only)
ocr extract image.png --min-confidence 60    # filter low-confidence words
ocr extract image.png --psm 6               # Tesseract page-seg mode (0–13)
ocr extract image.png --binarize --contrast 1.2 --denoise  # preprocessing
ocr extract image.png --dryrun              # validate args without running OCR
```

JSON output shape:
```json
{ "text": "...", "confidence": 87.3,
  "elements": [{ "text": "word", "confidence": 95.0,
                 "bbox": {"x":10,"y":20,"width":50,"height":15},
                 "level": "Word" }] }
```

### find — locate all occurrences of a string

```bash
ocr find screenshot.png "Submit" --json
ocr find ui.png "提交" --language chi_sim
ocr find page.png "Hello" --plain
```

JSON output shape:
```json
{ "matches": [{ "text": "Submit", "score": 1.0,
                "origin": {"x":100,"y":200,"width":60,"height":20} }] }
```

`find` requires Tesseract (bounding boxes). `--backend ollama` returns an error.

### mark — highlight matching text and save annotated image

```bash
ocr mark screenshot.png "Submit" -o out.png
ocr mark ui.png "提交" --language chi_sim --overwrite
ocr mark ui.png "Hello" --label-style numbers   # default: numbered badges
ocr mark ui.png "Hello" --label-style coords    # show (x,y) instead
ocr mark ui.png "Hello" --label-style none      # no labels
ocr mark ui.png "Hello" --uniform-color         # single color for all matches
ocr mark ui.png "Hello" --json                  # JSON of match placements
```

`mark` requires Tesseract. `--backend ollama` returns an error.

### doctor — check environment

```bash
ocr doctor                       # check Tesseract + language packs
ocr doctor --backend ollama      # check Ollama daemon + glm-ocr model
ocr doctor --json                # machine-readable output
ocr doctor --plain               # tab-separated status lines
```

Use `doctor --backend ollama` to diagnose: daemon reachable? model installed?

### languages list — list installed Tesseract language packs

```bash
ocr languages list
ocr languages list --json
ocr languages list --plain
```

### batch — process multiple images

```bash
ocr batch a.png b.png c.png --json
ocr batch --list paths.txt --plain
ocr batch scans/*.png --parallel --limit 50    # parallel: Tesseract only
ocr batch *.png --backend ollama               # sequential Ollama batch
ocr batch --list paths.txt --dryrun -v
```

`--parallel` is not supported with `--backend ollama` (returns an error).

### capture — screenshot OCR (macOS, requires Screen Recording permission)

```bash
ocr capture --json
ocr capture --region 0,0,1280,800 --save screen.png
ocr capture --monitor primary
```

`capture` requires Tesseract.

## Global flags (place after the subcommand)

| Flag | Effect |
|---|---|
| `--backend tesseract\|ollama` | select OCR backend |
| `--json` | JSON output |
| `--plain` | plain text, no decoration |
| `-v / --verbose` | debug info to stderr |
| `--quiet / -q` | suppress stderr |
| `--dryrun` | validate config/args, exit 0 without running OCR |
| `-c PATH\|-` | load JSON config file (or `-` for stdin) |

## Language codes (Tesseract)

Common aliases recognized automatically: `en`→`eng`, `zh`/`zh-cn`→`chi_sim`, `zh-tw`→`chi_tra`, `ja`→`jpn`, `ko`→`kor`, `fr`→`fra`, `de`→`deu`. Use `ocr languages list` for the full list.

## Agent-friendly patterns

```bash
# Pipe image bytes via stdin (no temp file)
curl -s https://example.com/img.png | ocr extract - --json --plain

# Validate config before running
```
